raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A broad request to check the passage centrally includes whether the gap and contribution framing are coherent at the idea level.","R1.2":"Checking the excerpt centrally involves verifying that the argument moves consistently from prior work to experiment, finding, metric, and contribution.","R1.3":"Because the passage makes empirical claims about metrics, rankings, and correlations, checking claim support against the reported evidence is central.","R1.6":"A generic check of a paper excerpt normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and academic register.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and the artifact is only an excerpt.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning stronger responsibilities than the brief delegation supports.","RX.3":"The projection must remain limited to responsibility classification rather than performing the requested check.","RX.4":"The projection must avoid encouraging unsupported or harmful downstream scientific claims.","RX.5":"The projection must keep responsibility assignments traceable to the delegation and artifact content."}}

rationale.R1.1: A broad request to check the passage centrally includes whether the gap and contribution framing are coherent at the idea level.
rationale.R1.2: Checking the excerpt centrally involves verifying that the argument moves consistently from prior work to experiment, finding, metric, and contribution.
rationale.R1.3: Because the passage makes empirical claims about metrics, rankings, and correlations, checking claim support against the reported evidence is central.
rationale.R1.6: A generic check of a paper excerpt normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and the artifact is only an excerpt.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning stronger responsibilities than the brief delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain limited to responsibility classification rather than performing the requested check.
rationale.RX.4: The projection must avoid encouraging unsupported or harmful downstream scientific claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must keep responsibility assignments traceable to the delegation and artifact content.
